---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the user pain or gap in functionality.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

**Scope**
Which part of the codebase would this touch?
- [ ] MCP tools (`src/tools/`)
- [ ] Catalog / adapters (`src/adapters/`, `src/catalog/`)
- [ ] Installer (`src/installer/`)
- [ ] omakase-chef behavior (`omakase-chef/SKILL.md`)
- [ ] CI / release workflow (`.github/workflows/`)
- [ ] Docs / README
- [ ] Other

**Are you willing to implement this?**
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No, just suggesting
